name: Centrus Energy Corp.
content: Centrus Energy is a leading supplier of nuclear fuel and services for the nuclear power industry. The company is the sole U.S. licensee for the production of High-Assay Low-Enriched Uranium (HALEU), which is essential for the next generation of advanced nuclear reactors and Small Modular Reactors (SMRs). Centrus is a direct beneficiary of the global shift toward secure, Western-allied enrichment capacity and the ongoing decoupling from Russian nuclear fuel supplies.
